failures.test_name: Validate ID Verification Underage Improvements - Underage Registration
failures.key_investigative_step: Computing the exact idvBirthdate from the AdminPASApiSteps.java formula and comparing against account_created (today - 10 days) — revealing the exact 18-year leap-year boundary condition
failures.notes: Root cause: idvBirthdate = today.minusYears(19).plusDays(356) lands on 2008-03-01 when today=2026-03-11, exactly 18 years before account_created (2026-03-01). Strict < 18 returns false. Fix: anchor idvBirthdate to accountCreated.minusYears(18).plusDays(1). Also: face-comparison pattern false-positively matched on generic 'Expected: a string containing' signature — consider requiring score >= 5 or keyword co-occurrence.

failures.test_name: Validation Not Met - Username criteria for Profile Auto-Moderation - Attractive Member (Auto-Approved after First Name Approval)
failures.key_investigative_step: Cross-referencing conditional rendering in approvals.blade.php with dispatchSync call in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php — realising requestData is only passed in async queue path, not sync
failures.notes: Root cause: ProcessDragynTextAssessment::dispatchSync omits Dragyn::getRequestData() — qa_reason never reaches the job. Real Dragyn called instead of mock, returns MODERATE with empty reason. approvals.blade.php @if(!empty(reason)) gates the span. Fix: pass requestData in dispatchSync path in UpdateProfileEventRequest.php

failures.test_name: Validation of Dragyn Photo Moderation with Attractive and Generous Members
failures.key_investigative_step: Serenity recordReportData captured 'Dragyn reason as -> Minor in photo' — revealing the actual Dragyn response before any code investigation. Without this, the actual reason in the UI was unknown and led to two wrong classifications.
failures.new_pattern_trigger: Test uploads a known content_type photo with no QA override, asserts a specific Dragyn reason, but Dragyn returns a different reason (ML false positive). Distinguish from QA regression by checking git history for recent removal of x-qa-override — if never present, it is intentional E2E; if recently removed, it is a QA regression.
failures.new_pattern_protocol: 1. Get actual reason from Serenity recordReportData ('Dragyn reason as'). 2. Check git log --since='14 days ago' on upload step for recent removal of qa_override / x-qa-override — if removed recently: QA Automation regression; if never present: intentional E2E. 3. If intentional: check image file git history for recent changes. 4. If no image/BE changes: Dragyn ML false positive, owner = Dragyn team.
failures.notes: Two wrong classifications before correct answer: (1) assumed reason was empty — corrected by user pointing to Serenity recorded data; (2) assumed step definition wiring bug — corrected by QA/BE confirming no override is intentional by design. Root cause: Dragyn ML returning 'Minor in photo' for group_of_people.jpg (unchanged since 2022). Pattern promoted to dragyn-false-positive.

failures.test_name: Validate Nickname field attempts on Edit Profile And PAS Queue
failures.key_investigative_step: git show 227a0ca07c -- AfterLoginPCR.tsx revealed that SATHREE-41561 removed local showModal state and handed control to modal manager — AfterLoginPCR no longer mounts unless modal manager rules are satisfied
failures.notes: QA fix attempt de9f0d3497 (WaitUntil.refreshIfElementIsUnstable) was treating a structural FE rendering issue as a timing problem. Test setup was correct before the migration — no QA changes required. Fix is entirely on FE: modal manager mounting rules must cover newly-registered unapproved user on Member page after PAS denial.
